About Nidhi Auto

Built for Reliable Automotive Supply Chains

Nidhi Auto LLP is a Bhiwadi-based subcontract manufacturing company specializing in precision-engineered automotive components.

With a strong production capacity of 500 MT and a portfolio of 45 products, we support OEMs and Tier-1 suppliers with consistent quality, on-time delivery, and competitive solutions.

Our experienced team, robust infrastructure, and process-driven approach ensure we meet the evolving needs of the automotive industry.

Our Capabilities

Sheet Metal Components

Precision sheet metal parts manufactured to strict tolerances.

Fabricated Parts

High-quality fabricated parts for diverse automotive applications.

Welded Assemblies

Strong, reliable welded assemblies built for performance.

Custom Auto Components

Tailored solutions to meet specific customer requirements.

Why Nidhi Auto

Dependable Production Capacity

500 MT capacity to handle regular and higher orders with consistency.

Quality-Focused Manufacturing

Process-driven approach ensuring quality at every stage.

Bhiwadi Industrial Location

Strategic location with easy access to industrial corridors and customers.

Repeat Production Support

Experience in managing repeat orders with stable quality.

Timely Dispatch

Efficient planning and logistics for on-time deliveries.

Quality & Process Control

1

Incoming Checks

Raw material verification and dimensional checks to ensure quality at the source.

2

In-Process Inspection

Regular process inspections and monitoring to maintain consistency and accuracy.

3

Final Inspection

Comprehensive inspection for functional, performance and dimensional before dispatch.

4

Dispatch Readiness

Secure packing and documentation to ensure safe and timely deliveries.
